rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2023 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT JAMES BANKS DEMURRER to 4TH Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The Court notes that demurrer was filed on December 27, 2022. However, based on Cross-Complainant filing an opposition on December 23, 2022 without a procedural objection, the Court addresses the demurrer on the merits and overrules it. Cross-Complaint has a leave to state a cause of action under CC 3334 and did so. Any arguments raised for the first time in the oversized reply are not considered. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. MEI LING FANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF CHARLES LI Motion For Terminating Sanctions is continued to February 21, 2023. Defendant Yan is ordered to respond to discovery (by mail and e-mail) at issue in this motion in accordance with the prior Court order no later than January 30, 2023. Defendant shall appear and participate in the deposition on a mutually agreeable date before January 31, 2023. If parties cannot agree on a date, deposition shall proceed on January 19, 2023 and Plaintiff to provide notice (location, time, etc) at least 5 days in advance. No later than January 31, 2023 Yan to file a declaration confirming under the penalty of perjury that complete verified responses without objections have been provided. No later than February 10, 2022 Plaintiff may file a supplemental brief to address any deficiencies. If there are no deficiencies, Plaintiff shall file Notice of Withdrawal of Motion by no later than February 10, 2023. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SF REALTY PARTNERS, LLC VS. AMPEX ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Quash Stay Covered Builders, Inc. Seventeen Deposition Subpoenas Or, In The Alternative, For A Protective Order
